brand.name: Original Times consultation
brand.tagline: Your route from ambition to admission

contact.address: 3rd Floor, Blue Horizon Tower, Blue Area, Islamabad, Pakistan

about.heading: We've walked international students through the door before
about.story: Original Times Consultants was founded in 2014 by a small group of former international students who remembered exactly how confusing the process felt the first time around. What started as informal advice sessions in a shared office has grown into a full consultancy trusted by thousands of families, without losing the one-on-one attention that made it work in the first place.
about.mission: To make world-class education abroad a realistic, well-planned decision for every student we work with, not a stroke of luck.

team.name: Ayesha Raza
team.bio: MSc Education, University of Manchester. 12 years guiding students through UK & EU admissions.

team.name: Bilal Haider
team.bio: Former visa officer consultant, specializes in US and Canada study permits.

team.name: Sana Tariq
team.bio: IELTS/GRE trainer with a decade of classroom and online coaching experience.

team.name: Omar Farooq
team.bio: Helped students secure over $2M in combined scholarship funding since 2018.

services.title: University & Course Selection
services.description: We shortlist universities and programs that actually fit your grades, budget, and career goals, not just the popular names.

services.title: Application & SOP Support
services.description: Hands-on help with applications, statements of purpose, and letters of recommendation that sound like you, not a template.

services.title: Test Preparation
services.description: Structured IELTS, PTE, GRE, and SAT coaching in small batches, with practice tests scored the same way the real exam is.

services.title: Visa Filing & Interview Coaching
services.description: Document checklists, mock interviews, and filing support for the US, UK, Canada, Australia, and Europe.

services.title: Scholarship Guidance
services.description: We identify scholarships you're eligible for and help you build a competitive, honest case for funding.

services.title: Pre-Departure Briefing
services.description: Housing, flights, banking, and what to actually pack, from people who have sent thousands of students off before you.

process.detail: Free first consultation to understand your goals, budget, and academic profile.
We build a shortlist of realistic universities and programs together with you.
Applications, essays, and documents are prepared, reviewed, and submitted on time.
Test prep, visa filing, and interview coaching once your offer is in hand.
Pre-departure briefing and ongoing support during your first months abroad.

testimonials.name: Hina Malik
testimonials.detail: MSc Data Science, University of Leeds
testimonials.quote: They told me honestly which universities were a stretch and which were realistic. That honesty is why I trusted the whole process.

testimonials.name: Ahmed Zaidi
testimonials.detail: BSc Computer Science, University of Toronto
testimonials.quote: My visa was filed without a single follow-up request from the embassy. Every document was exactly where it needed to be.

testimonials.name: Fatima Noor
testimonials.quote: The scholarship guidance alone covered half my tuition. I would not have found that program on my own.
